settings.subtitle: A pocket-sized thermal printer that turns thoughts, photos, lists, and ideas — into something you can hold. Wireless. Inkless. Instant.

settings.body:
We live in infinite scroll. Every photo, idea, and memory — trapped behind a screen.

PocketPrint changes that. A printer that fits in your hand. Connects in seconds. And brings the things you love back into the physical world — where they belong.

settings.title: Designed for [i]life[/i] in motion.
settings.intro: Every component refined to disappear into the moment. So all you notice is what comes out.

settings.title: From idea to [i]paper[/i] in three taps.
Pair
settings.description: Open the PocketPrint app and connect via Bluetooth. Setup takes less than 8 seconds — no accounts, no friction.

settings.title: Pick
settings.description: Choose a photo, write a note, scan a doc, or grab a meme. Apply filters, frames, retro effects — whatever fits the mood.

settings.title: Print
settings.description: Hit print. In 6 seconds, you're holding a tangible piece of your day. No ink. No mess. Just paper, in your hand.

settings.quote: This thing changed the way I journal. Genuinely obsessed.
The build quality alone justifies the price. Tiny but premium.
My 8-year-old has not stopped printing. Cheaper than therapy.
Worth every euro. The app is shockingly good for the price.
Legitimate Teenage Engineering energy at one-tenth the price.
Bought one, then bought three more for my friends. It's that good.

settings.title: Built like an [i]heirloom.[/i]
settings.description: Every spec was chosen to feel premium in a way most printers don't bother with. Aluminum body. Soft-touch finish. Magnetic cover. The details show up in the hand.

settings.title: Made for the [i]things[/i] you actually do.
Print the moments you'd [i]otherwise scroll past.[/i]
settings.description: Photos. Texts. Tickets. Letters from someone who matters. Hold them. Stick them. Keep them.

settings.title: Flashcards. Mind-maps. [i]In seconds.[/i]
settings.description: Print PDFs, key passages, vocab. Stick them in your textbook. Revise without the screen.

settings.title: Grocery lists. Habit trackers. [i]Tiny manifestos.[/i]
settings.description: Whatever you'd normally lose in your Notes app — print it. Stick it. Cross it off in pen.

settings.title: An infinite roll of [i]good ideas.[/i]
settings.description: Drawings. Stickers. Tiny posters. Birthday tags. The kind of magic that doesn't expire.

settings.title: Free Express Shipping
settings.description: Orders placed before 2pm ship the same day. Tracked, insured, and delivered to your door in 3–5 business days worldwide.

settings.title: 30-Day Risk-Free Trial
settings.description: Live with it for a month. Print everything. If it doesn't earn its place on your desk, send it back. No questions, no fees.

settings.title: 2-Year Warranty
settings.description: Covered, end-to-end. If something goes wrong with the hardware in two years — replacement, on us. Genuine human support included.

settings.title: Real [i]answers.[/i]
settings.support_text: Still curious? Our team replies within 4 hours.

settings.question: Is the printing really inkless?
settings.answer: Yes. PocketPrint uses thermal printing technology — heat activates the special paper to create the image. No cartridges, no refills, no mess. Ever.

settings.question: Will it work with my phone?
settings.answer: If your phone runs iOS 14+ or Android 9+, you're set. The free PocketPrint app handles everything via Bluetooth 5.0 — no Wi-Fi or accounts required.

settings.question: How long does the paper last?
settings.answer: Our premium thermal rolls last 5+ years when stored in normal conditions, and 10+ years for our archival paper add-on. Keep them out of direct sunlight for best results.

settings.question: Where do you ship?
settings.answer: Worldwide. Shipping is free on every order. Most countries see delivery within 3–5 business days — every package is tracked and insured.

settings.question: What's the print resolution?
settings.answer: 203 DPI — sharp enough for photos, dense enough for text, fast enough that you'll forget you're waiting.

settings.question: Can I print in color?
settings.answer: Standard rolls print in monochrome (which honestly looks gorgeous). For color, we sell pink, blue, and gold-tone thermal rolls in the Creator Pack.

settings.question: What if I don't love it?
settings.answer: Send it back within 30 days for a full refund. No restocking fees, no return shipping costs. We're confident it'll stay — but you're never locked in.

settings.subtitle: Free shipping. 30-day trial. 2-year warranty. There's nothing to lose, and there's something tangible to gain.
